_publications._publicationTitle: The draft genome of the Wisconsin Miniature SwineTM, a valuable biomedical research tool.

_contextSnippet: Comparison of the WMS TM NF1 amino acid sequence to the human homolog (ENST00000358273.9) revealed a 99.12% (2817/2842) identity match and an additional 10 positions in which they shared similar amino acids (99.47% similarity match).
details: WMS TM NF1 amino acid sequence shows 99.12% identity match (2817/2842) to human homolog with 99.47% similarity match
